creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
See here: http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/faq222.html#q4

If your /media/.hal-mtab isn't empty when you don't have mount stuff, be  
sure to remove it and reboot.

Cheers,
Mezz
